overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The journey begins on an elevated industrial walkway, descends through a graffiti-covered area, passes through a narrow neon-lit alley with red lanterns, and emerges onto a wide city boulevard with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial walkway with large pipes and billboards

events.description: beginning descent down concrete ramp from elevated platform to lower level

agents.ego_description: following a character in red clothing down a weathered concrete ramp between industrial structures

notable_agents.action: leading the way down the ramp wearing a red and black outfit

entered.detail: large metal pipes with red neon accent lights running along the left wall
massive digital billboard displaying advertisements on a distant building facade
weathered concrete walkway with metal railings descending between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated industrial walkway at night, following a character down a concrete ramp. Large industrial pipes with red neon lights line the left wall while a massive digital billboard glows in the distance on the right. The camera descends steadily, revealing graffiti-covered walls as the path winds downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level passage with large mural wall and concrete barriers

events.description: reaching street level with large colorful mural visible on left wall
approaching and entering stairway leading down to lower alley level

agents.ego_description: walking along a wall covered in vibrant graffiti and murals, approaching a descending stairway

notable_agents.action: continuing to lead the way past the mural toward the alley entrance

entered.detail: vibrant street art depicting a figure with a sword in purple, yellow, and red tones covering the wall
low concrete walls and dividers along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the camera moves along a wall featuring a massive colorful mural of a sword-wielding figure. Concrete barriers line the path as the character approaches a stairway leading further down. The industrial pipes and distant billboard from the previous area disappear from view as the scene tightens into a more enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow Asian-inspired alley with hanging red lanterns and food vendors

events.description: entering narrow covered alleyway illuminated by hanging red paper lanterns
passing under dense cluster of red lanterns casting red ambient glow on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow atmospheric alley lined with food stalls and glowing neon signs

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at a food stall with green neon lighting and Japanese signage

entered.detail: traditional paper lanterns hanging overhead in a continuous series, glowing warm red
small vendor stalls with green neon lighting, Japanese characters, and serving counters
various glowing signs with Japanese text and brand logos attached to the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, atmospheric alleyway straight out of a traditional Japanese street, but reimagined with cyberpunk aesthetics. Red paper lanterns hang overhead in dense clusters, casting a warm red glow on the wet tiled pavement below. Food stalls with green neon lighting line the left side while various neon signs illuminate the right wall, creating an intimate, enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: major city boulevard with towering skyscrapers and massive digital advertising

events.description: exiting narrow alley into wide city street with towering buildings and vehicle traffic
yellow taxi and other vehicles passing by on the wet street reflecting neon lights
turning right to follow the sidewalk along the main boulevard past the BD SHACK building

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy city sidewalk beneath towering skyscrapers with massive neon advertisements and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the wet street, headlights reflecting off the pavement
pedestrian in white coat walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: tall building featuring massive red neon signage reading BD SHACK with a hand logo
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and green accent lighting
elevated highway or monorail track structure running above the street level
large electronic advertising screens and digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens dramatically into a wide city boulevard lined with towering futuristic skyscrapers. The massive BD SHACK neon sign dominates the right side, growing larger as the camera approaches. Vehicles including a yellow taxi drive past on the wet asphalt, their lights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. The camera turns right to follow the sidewalk beneath an overpass structure, surrounded by the towering glass and steel architecture of Night City.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated industrial zone into a claustrophobic neon alleyway before finally opening onto a sprawling metropolitan boulevard. It begins on a concrete ramp lined with red neon pipes, following a character downward as the view of a distant digital billboard is gradually replaced by graffiti-covered walls. As the camera reaches street level, the industrial scale shifts into a more enclosed passage featuring a massive colorful mural and concrete barriers. The scene then tightens further into a narrow, atmospheric alleyway where red paper lanterns and green neon food stalls cast a warm glow over wet tiled pavement. Finally, the corridor opens dramatically into a wide city boulevard dominated by towering skyscrapers and a massive BD SHACK sign, with the camera gliding past rain-slicked asphalt and yellow taxis toward the glass and steel architecture of the city center.
